name: Hot Beef Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter in a skillet until tender.
2. Stir in white wine; simmer for 2 minutes.
3. Add cream cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, and dried beef; mix well.
4. Spoon mixture into an 8-inch square baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with chopped pecans.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Serve with assorted crackers. Yield: 4 cups
